help_menu: Click on the buttons below to get information about my commands. Note: All commands can be used with /
help_admins: Admin Commands: /pause: Pause the ongoing stream. /resume: Resume the paused stream. /skip: Skip the current stream. /stop: Stop the ongoing stream. /seek [duration in seconds]: Seek in the ongoing stream. /seekback [duration in seconds]: Seek backward in the ongoing stream. /reload: Reload the admin cache.
help_auth: Auth Commands: Authorized users can control the ongoing stream without being admins. /auth: Add a user to the authorized users list. /unauth: Remove a user from the authorized users list.
help_blist: Blacklist Commands: Blacklisted chats and users cannot use the bot. /blacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Add a chat/user to the blacklist. /unblacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Remove a chat/user from the blacklist
help_lang: Language Commands: This bot supports multiple languages. /lang: Change the bot's language.
help_ping: Ping Commands: /help: Shows the help menu of the bot. /ping: Check the ping and memory usage of the bot. /start: Start the bot. /sudolist: Shows the list of sudo users of the bot.
help_play: Play Commands: You can play music in video chat using the following commands. /play [Song Name/Youtube URL/Reply to Audio]: Play music in video chat. /vplay [Song Name/Youtube URL/Reply to Video]: Play music video in video chat. -f: Force play music in video chat. -v: Play music video in video chat. Example: /play -f -v attention
help_queue: Queue Commands: /queue: Shows the tracks currently in queue.
help_stats: Stats Commands: /stats: Shows the stats of the bot.
help_sudo: Sudo Commands: /ac: Shows the active call count. /activevc: Shows the list of active calls. /broadcast [Reply to message]: Broadcast message to all chats. -nochat: Exclude groups from broadcast. -user: Include users in broadcast. -copy: Remove forwarded tag from broadcast message. Example: /broadcast -user -copy /eval: Execute given code. /logs: Send the log file. /logger [on|off]: Enable/disable the logger. /restart: Restart the bot. /addsudo: Add a user to the sudo users list. /rmsudo: Remove a user from the sudo users list.
